description: Returns max load value of given uniform, vest or backpack container. For other types of containers, use [[maxLoad]] command
examples:
<sqf>
private _maxLoadUniform		= getContainerMaxLoad uniform player;
private _maxLoadVest		= getContainerMaxLoad vest player;
private _maxLoadBackpack	= getContainerMaxLoad backpack player;
</sqf>
name: getContainerMaxLoad
